name: ihudak-plugins
description: Ivan Gudak's private Claude Code plugin marketplace — productivity and workflow tools

plugins.name: dev-workflows
plugins.description: Five slash commands — /impl (help / dispatcher), /impl:code, /impl:docs, /impl:jira:docs, /impl:jira:epics — plus /vuln and /upgrade, with Opus-backed planning, code review, product-docs review, and Epic review. Fifteen reusable subagents (risk-planner, code-review, doc-reviewer, epic-reviewer, test-baseline, test-writer, review-fixer, doc-fixer, docs-style-checker, doc-planner, doc-location-finder, jira-reader, code-diff-summarizer, code-scanner, impl-maintenance) and three notification / context hooks.

plugins.name: obsidian-llm-wiki
plugins.description: LLM Wiki pattern for an active Obsidian vault. Eight slash commands (/wiki-init, /wiki-ingest, /wiki-scan, /wiki-query, /wiki-save, /wiki-lint, /wiki-hot, /wiki-tags-refresh) compile knowledge from meetings, projects, daily notes, and raw sources into a persistent, cross-referenced wiki at wiki/. Supports Claude Code and GitHub Copilot as first-class agents with session-continuity hooks.
